title: Point Reyes Light — November 1, 1962 (Page 4)
author: Point Reyes Light Staff
card_summary: A single page from the Point Reyes Light, a weekly community newspaper serving Point Reyes Station, California, dated November 1, 1962, Page 4. Philip K. Dick lived in the Point Reyes area during this period, and issues from this paper are preserved as contextual documents relating to his local environment.
page_summary:
A scanned newspaper page from the Point Reyes Light (Point Reyes Station, California), dated Thursday, November 1, 1962, page 4. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com and downloaded on April 5, 2025. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

Point Reyes Station is located in western Marin County, California, near where Philip K. Dick lived during the early 1960s. The date falls in November 1962, the same year The Man in the High Castle was published. The Point Reyes Light was a small weekly newspaper serving the rural communities of western Marin County. Clippings from this newspaper are preserved in the archive to document Dick's local environment during this critical period of his career.
